name: Azure Cloud Breathing Method
description: A foundational breathing art taught to new disciples of the Azure Cloud Sect.

name: Pine Shadow Step
description: A basic footwork technique that teaches the body to move like wind through mountain pines.

name: Iron Body Method
description: A body-hardening cultivation method that roots qi into muscle and skin, converting incoming force into something the body can absorb and answer.

name: Wind Blade Strike
description: An elemental strike technique that condenses Wind qi along the striking limb into a cutting edge. Grows sharper as Wind affinity deepens.

name: Void Step
description: An advanced footwork method discovered through deep mastery of Pine Shadow Step. The practitioner briefly occupies no position, then reappears wherever they choose.
